# Platform Golden-Path Checklist

## Summary

- Golden path name:
- Platform owner:
- User team:
- Date:
- Current lifecycle gate: Build Readiness

## Developer User Need

Describe the internal developer problem this golden path solves.

## Self-Service Path

- [ ] Clear starting point exists.
- [ ] Template or scaffold exists.
- [ ] Required approvals are documented.
- [ ] Local development path is documented.
- [ ] Deployment path is documented.

## Guardrails

- [ ] Security defaults are safe.
- [ ] Secrets are not exposed.
- [ ] Logging and telemetry are included.
- [ ] Rollback or destroy path exists.
- [ ] Cost controls or budget signals exist where relevant.

## Documentation

- [ ] Quickstart exists.
- [ ] Architecture notes exist.
- [ ] Operational runbook exists.
- [ ] Known limitations are documented.
- [ ] Support route is documented.

## Adoption Signals

- First team using it:
- Friction found:
- Time saved:
- Reuse potential:

## Decision

- [ ] Promote as paved road
- [ ] Keep as pilot
- [ ] Rework before broader use
